_note: Seeded benchmark targets for patient_04_23andme.txt. Records which variants were deliberately placed in the input file. Intended profile: TPMT *3B/*3B (homozygous) -> Deficient activity. Homozygous rather than compound *2/*3B because unphased array data cannot confirm a compound het (cis vs trans), so the engine would honestly return 'Not determined'. rs1800462 (*2) and rs1142345 (*3C) are reference so the engine has full TPMT coverage.
